title: The Holy Family from Outer Space: Reconsidering Philip K. Dick's The Divine Invasion
author: Umberto Rossi
card_summary: A scholarly article from Extrapolation (Vol. 52, No. 2, January 2011) in which Umberto Rossi reconsiders Dick's novel The Divine Invasion through the concept of the holy family. Rossi, a prominent Italian Dick scholar, examines the theological and familial structures in one of Dick's most overtly religious late novels. 21 pages.
works_discussed: The Man in the High Castle
